summary: Iteration 44: All 5 bug fixes verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - Staff Swaps cancel button, Week Starts On dropdown, Admin Dashboard 'On floor now' text, Shift Scheduler week view.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, same as iteration 43

critical_code_review_comments: swap_requests.py: can_accept flag correctly set for admin when staff_id is in target_staff_ids
swap_requests.py: DELETE /api/swap-requests/{id} endpoint properly cancels waiting_acceptance and pending_approval requests
swap_requests.py: DELETE endpoint correctly rejects cancel for already-approved requests (status 400)
shifts.py: copy_week now deletes target week shifts before copying - no duplicates on repeated copy
attendance.py: All clock_out=None queries now include is_operational: {'$ne': False} filter
attendance.py: Sick leave creates attendance with record_type='leave' and is_operational=false
RestaurantSettings.js: week_start_day dropdown with Monday/Sunday/Saturday options
ShiftScheduler.js: getWeekDates uses weekStartDay from restaurant settings
AdminDashboard.js: 'On floor now' text in On Shift card, unavailable count shown when > 0
StaffSwapRequests.js: Cancel (X) button on pending swap requests with handleCancelSwap
seed_data_creation: Test shifts and swap requests created and cleaned up during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified 5 bug fixes: (1) Swap requests can_accept flag for admin when in target_staff_ids - VERIFIED. (2) DELETE /api/swap-requests/{id} cancels waiting_acceptance requests - VERIFIED. (3) DELETE rejects cancel for approved requests - VERIFIED. (4) Copy week clears target week before copying (no duplicates) - VERIFIED. (5) Attendance live/my-status/dashboard-stats exclude is_operational=false records - VERIFIED. (6) Sick leave creates non-operational attendance - VERIFIED. (7) Week Starts On dropdown in Settings with Mon/Sun/Sat options - VERIFIED. (8) Shift Scheduler respects week_start_day - VERIFIED. (9) Admin Dashboard shows 'On floor now' + unavailable count - VERIFIED. (10) Staff Swaps page has cancel button on pending requests - VERIFIED.

swap_can_accept_for_admin.evidence: GET /api/swap-requests as admin returns can_accept=true when staff_id in target_staff_ids

swap_cancel_waiting_acceptance.evidence: DELETE /api/swap-requests/{id} returns 200 and message 'Swap request cancelled'

copy_week_no_duplicates.evidence: Copying week twice results in same shift count (target cleared before copy)

live_attendance_excludes_non_operational.evidence: GET /api/attendance/live returns only is_operational != false records

sick_leave_non_operational_attendance.evidence: POST /api/shifts/drop with reason_code=sickness creates attendance with is_operational=false

week_start_day_setting.evidence: Settings page has Week Starts On dropdown with Monday/Sunday/Saturday options

shift_scheduler_week_view.evidence: Shift Scheduler shows week starting from configured day (Mon by default)

admin_dashboard_on_floor_now.evidence: On Shift card shows 'On floor now' text

staff_swaps_cancel_button.evidence: Staff Swaps page shows X (cancel) button on pending swap requests

login_admin_works.evidence: SKAdmin login returns access_token with role=admin

mocked_apis_list: Firebase push notifications (live credentials, but test device tokens are fake)
